---
title: "Web_scaping"
format: html
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(rvest)
library(polite)
```


```{r}
session <- bow( "https://www.bestplaces.net/city/illinois/naperville", force = TRUE) 
nih_title <- scrape(session) |>
  html_nodes("b , .list-group-item-action") |>
  html_text()

nih_title 

```
